scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:a2a" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:api" --names ui,mcp,a2a,api --prefix-colors blue,yellow,magenta,green --kill-others
scripts.dev:mcp: cd ../backend/mcp && uv run python -m uvicorn main:rest_app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload
scripts.dev:a2a: cd ../backend/agent-a2a && uv run python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5002 --reload
scripts.dev:api: cd ../backend/api && uv run python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:a2a" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:api" --names mcp,a2a,api --prefix-colors yellow,magenta,green --kill-others
